items.question: What does tree-shaking do?
options: removes unused code from the bundle
items.answer: removes unused code from the bundle
items.explanation: It eliminates dead exports, mainly via static ESM imports.

items.question: Which tool type-checks TypeScript?
items.explanation: Fast transpilers strip types; tsc actually checks them.

items.question: What is Vite primarily?
items.explanation: Vite provides a fast dev server (esbuild) and a Rollup build.

items.question: Why run a separate tsc step when using esbuild/Vite?
items.explanation: They transpile fast but skip type checking.
